title: Christmas Wreath, 46cm/18inch Christmas Wreaths for Front Door with Dried Orange Slice, Pinecones, Cinnamon, Christmas Door Wreaths for Christmas Decoration
features: Festive & Inviting Design: Create a warm holiday welcome with beautifully 46cm christmas wreaths featuring a mix of classic greenery, vibrant berries, orange slices and subtle pine cones for a cheerful glow.

Built to Last: Engineered from high-grade, weather-resistant PE material, this christmas wreath is made for both indoor and outdoor use. The Christmas door wreath retains its color and shape, promising durability and reusability without the mess of real greenery.

Decorate with Ease: Its versatile design allows you to hang this xmas wreath practically anywhere—on your front door to greet guests, in the living room for a festive centerpiece, or along a stairway banister for a seamless holiday look.
An Instant Gift Solution: This advent wreath comes beautifully boxed, making it an instant, thoughtful Christmas gift or Thanksgiving present.

Reusable Elegance: Invest in a piece of holiday elegance that returns every year. Its full and realistic construction provides a high-end look, making your holiday decorating simple, stylish, and sustainable.
